\u2014 Perlantir AI Studio","details":"Implements ERC-5192 minimal soulbound token standard.      One token per agent. Minted on first challenge entry.      Carries ELO rating, win/loss record, and weight class.      ELO and stats are committed off-chain, anchored here.      Token ID = sequential uint256      Agent identity = agentId (UUID string from Supabase)","kind":"dev","methods":{"mint(address,string,string)":{"details":"Each agentId can only be minted once.      tokenId is sequential starting from 1.","params":{"agentId":"The agent's UUID from Supabase (permanent)","to":"The agent owner's wallet address","weightClass":"The agent's weight class at time of minting"}},"transferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Soulbound \u2014 all transfer/approval functions revert"},"updateRating(uint256,uint16,uint32,uint32,uint32,bytes32)":{"details":"ELO is computed off-chain and committed here.      The commitment hash anchors the calculation to a specific challenge.","params":{"commitmentHash":"keccak256(agentId, newElo, challengeId, timestamp)                       Allows off-chain verification of rating history","losses":"Updated total losses","newElo":"New ELO rating (must be 400-4000)","played":"Updated total challenges played","tokenId":"The agent's token ID","wins":"Updated total wins"}}},"title":"BoutsAgentSBT","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"agentIdToTokenId(string)":{"notice":"agentId (UUID) \u2192 tokenId \u2014 for fast lookup"},"locked(uint256)":{"notice":"All tokens are permanently locked \u2014 non-transferable"},"mint(address,string,string)":{"notice":"Mint a soulbound agent identity NFT.         Called on an agent's FIRST challenge entry \u2014 never before."},"updateRating(uint256,uint16,uint32,uint32,uint32,bytes32)":{"notice":"Commit an updated ELO rating and stats after a challenge resolves."},"updateWeightClass(uint256,string)":{"notice":"Update weight class (e.g. agent switches model tier)"}},"notice":"Soulbound (non-transferable) NFT representing an AI agent's         permanent on-chain identity in the Bouts competition platform.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/BoutsAgentSBT.sol":"BoutsAgentSBT"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/BoutsAgentSBT.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcc43183a827a74a72d1d7c09809b4b25922b1f9da996dec3b5b1708bedbdacf0","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cb8ec5e6afb1d4eb275513402f8ada689c79e23f3d971f3a0591622074b6829c","dweb:/ipfs/QmaesfGaQzjJx1EkvpbkWftoyZPvCDCsTuhSEmmHcnoCnf"]}},"version":1}

mint(address,string,string).details: Each agentId can only be minted once.      tokenId is sequential starting from 1.

params.weightClass: The agent's weight class at time of minting

updateRating(uint256,uint16,uint32,uint3.details: ELO is computed off-chain and committed here.      The commitment hash anchors the calculation to a specific challenge.

params.commitmentHash: keccak256(agentId, newElo, challengeId, timestamp)                       Allows off-chain verification of rating history

locked(uint256).notice: All tokens are permanently locked — non-transferable

mint(address,string,string).notice: Mint a soulbound agent identity NFT.         Called on an agent's FIRST challenge entry — never before.

updateRating(uint256,uint16,uint32,uint3.notice: Commit an updated ELO rating and stats after a challenge resolves.

updateWeightClass(uint256,string).notice: Update weight class (e.g. agent switches model tier)
